title: Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach
use_when: Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach. Trigger terms: stakeholder-management, design-strategy, conflict-resolution.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach when the request is mainly metric diagnosis, pricing, GTM, or implementation planning without UX evidence; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach fits Design work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach as generic Design advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $conflicting-stakeholder-requirements-to-balanced-design to turn this conflicting context into a decision-ready Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Conflicting stakeholder requirements to balanced design approach UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
